rules.title: npm cache
rules.explanation: Downloaded package archives npm keeps so reinstalls are fast.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds itself as you install packages. Zero cost.

rules.title: uv cache
rules.explanation: Python package cache kept by the uv package manager.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds itself on the next install. Zero cost.

rules.title: pip cache
rules.explanation: Downloaded wheel archives pip keeps for reinstalls.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds itself on the next install. Zero cost.

rules.title: Homebrew cache
rules.explanation: Downloaded bottles and old formula versions Homebrew keeps around.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on demand; `brew cleanup` does the same thing.

rules.title: Spotify streaming cache
rules.explanation: Songs you streamed recently, kept locally so replaying is instant.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds as you listen. Spotify should be quit before clearing.

rules.title: Xcode Previews cache
rules.explanation: Build products Xcode keeps so SwiftUI previews start fast.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds automatically; first preview afterwards is slower.

rules.title: Playwright browsers
rules.explanation: Browser builds downloaded by the Playwright test framework.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on the next `playwright install`.

rules.title: Puppeteer browsers
rules.explanation: Chromium builds downloaded by the Puppeteer library.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on the next install.

rules.title: Electron build cache
rules.explanation: Electron binaries cached by dev tooling.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on the next build.

rules.title: Zig compiler cache
rules.explanation: Incremental build artifacts kept by the Zig compiler.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds on the next compile.

rules.title: Python bytecode cache
rules.explanation: Compiled bytecode Python drops beside source files.
rules.regeneration: Regenerates on the next run. Zero cost.

rules.title: Node.js dependencies
rules.explanation: Installed packages for a JavaScript project.
rules.regeneration: Next `npm install` (or pnpm/yarn/bun) restores them from the lockfile.

rules.title: Swift build directory
rules.explanation: Compiled artifacts from Swift Package Manager.
rules.regeneration: Next `swift build` recompiles from source.

rules.title: Rust build directory
rules.explanation: Compiled artifacts from Cargo.
rules.regeneration: Next `cargo build` recompiles from source.

rules.title: Next.js build output
rules.explanation: Compiled pages and build cache for a Next.js project.
rules.regeneration: Next `next build` / dev server run regenerates it.

rules.title: Python virtual environment
rules.explanation: An isolated Python environment with installed packages.
rules.regeneration: Recreate with `python -m venv` / `uv venv` and reinstall dependencies.

rules.title: Xcode DerivedData
rules.explanation: Build products and indexes for every Xcode project you've opened.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds on the next build of each project; first builds are slower.

rules.title: iOS Simulator devices
rules.explanation: Disk images for every simulator device Xcode has created.
rules.regeneration: Xcode recreates devices on demand; installed test apps are lost.

rules.title: Claude Desktop VM bundles
rules.explanation: Virtual machine images Claude Desktop uses for sandboxed sessions.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads when a feature needs them.

rules.title: User cache directory
rules.explanation: The XDG cache home — command-line tools keep their caches here by convention.
rules.regeneration: Tools rebuild their caches on next use. Zero cost.

rules.title: App caches
rules.explanation: macOS's designated cache folder — every app's cache lives here by convention.
rules.regeneration: Apps rebuild their caches as you use them.

rules.title: Cargo registry cache
rules.explanation: Downloaded Rust crate sources and archives.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on the next cargo build.

rules.title: Gradle caches
rules.explanation: Downloaded dependencies and build caches kept by Gradle.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads on the next Gradle build.

rules.title: Bun install cache
rules.explanation: Package cache kept by the Bun runtime.
rules.regeneration: Rebuilds on the next bun install.

rules.title: pnpm store
rules.explanation: Content-addressed package store kept by pnpm.
rules.regeneration: Re-downloads packages on the next pnpm install.

rules.title: App cache
rules.explanation: Lives in macOS's designated cache folder — cache by OS convention.
rules.regeneration: The owning app rebuilds it as needed.

rules.title: Tool cache
rules.explanation: Lives in the XDG cache directory — cache by convention.
rules.regeneration: The owning tool rebuilds it as needed.
